description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a predominantly orange and black color scheme. The front panel displays a retro video game screen surrounded by a decorative bezel, with a joystick and four buttons for player input, as well as a coin slot and speaker grille. The side panels are adorned with bold, stylized artwork depicting a futuristic tank firing at flying saucers, with the word 'BADPIXEL' prominently displayed in a comic-style explosion. The top section houses a marquee with the same 'BADPIXEL' branding in white on an orange background. The rear panel is plain and unadorned, likely serving as an access point for maintenance. The cabinet is constructed from sturdy materials, with a glossy finish and hard surfaces typical of vintage arcade machines.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with orange and black retro artwork, a joystick and buttons, and a 'BADPIXEL' marquee. The side panels feature bold sci-fi graphics with tanks and flying saucers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the game screen, joystick, four buttons, coin slot, speaker grille, and the 'BADPIXEL' marquee.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the orange panel with bold 'BADPIXEL' text and stylized tank and saucer artwork.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid black panel with no visible features or artwork.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the same orange sci-fi artwork and an additional visible coin mechanism.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium size with a thick black bezel and retro game graphics visible
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and four round buttons arranged in a diamond pattern, orange and black color scheme
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; orange background with bold white 'BADPIXEL' text in a stylized, retro font, matching the side panel theme
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature large, bold orange backgrounds with black and white comic-style artwork of a tank firing at flying saucers, and the 'BADPIXEL' logo in a dramatic explosion motif
